info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing the ecommerce platform including products, orders, and customer data.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including creation, update, and deletion.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders and order processing.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Manage customer information and profile settings.

post.description: Allows creation of a new user account by submitting user details. Validates input and returns the created user profile on success.

example.message: The provided user data is invalid.
A user with the provided details already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place an order for a user
post.description: Initiates a new order for the specified user. Validates order details and returns order confirmation and details upon success.

example.message: The order request contains invalid data.

details.issue: Order items list cannot be empty

example.message: No user found with the specified userId.

details.issue: User with this ID does not exist

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve order details by order ID
get.description: Fetches detailed information about an order given its unique identifier. Returns the order details if found.

example.message: The provided order ID format is invalid.

details.issue: Order ID must be a valid UUID

example.message: No order found with the specified ID.

details.issue: Order does not exist in the system

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to user's cart
post.description: Adds a specific item to the shopping cart of the specified user. Requires item details in the request body and returns the updated cart.

requestBody.description: Item to add to the cart

example.message: The cart item details provided are invalid.

details.issue: Quantity must be greater than zero

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetches the current contents of the shopping cart for the specified user, providing item details and quantities.

example.message: The userId provided is invalid.

details.issue: Must be a valid user identifier

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track a shipment by order ID
get.description: Retrieves the current tracking details for a shipment associated with the specified order ID. Input is the order ID path parameter. Returns tracking information including status, location, and estimated delivery.

404.description: Tracking information not found for the given order ID

example.message: No tracking information found for order ID ord-7b3d8f2a

details.issue: No tracking record exists for the provided order ID

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving tracking information

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the product catalog. The request body must include all necessary product details such as name, description, price, and stock quantity. The operation returns the created product with unique product ID and related metadata.

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

example.message: Product data is invalid or incomplete

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Product with given SKU already exists

example.message: Product with the given SKU already exists

500.description: Internal server error while adding product

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Handles asynchronous payment status updates sent by payment providers via webhook. The request body carries the payload sent by the payment gateway including transaction status and details. Returns a confirmation response acknowledging receipt.

requestBody.description: Payload containing payment webhook notification data

example.message: The payment webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields

402.description: Payment required or payment processing failed

example.message: Payment processing failed or payment is required

details.issue: Payment status indicates failure or pending payment

500.description: Internal server error during webhook processing

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process for a given order. The request body should include payment details such as amount, payment method, and order reference. Returns a payment transaction object including status and payment gateway details.

example.message: Payment request data is invalid or incomplete

details.issue: Amount must be greater than zero

402.description: Payment required or failed to process

example.message: Payment could not be processed or is required to complete order

details.issue: Payment method is invalid or missing

500.description: Internal server error while initiating payment

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

transactionId.description: Identifier provided by the payment gateway for the transaction

totalAmount.description: Total monetary amount for the order before discounts

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

totalDiscount.description: Total discount amount applied to the order

currency.description: Currency code for the order amount

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

createdAt.description: Date and time when the user was created

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

userType.description: Type or role of the user in the system

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the user was last updated

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Quantity of the product available in stock

quantity.description: The number of units ordered for the product.

price.description: Unit price of the product before any discounts.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to the product.

finalPrice.description: Final price for the product after discount.

quantity.description: Quantity of this product in the cart.

price.description: Price per unit of the product before discount.

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount.

currency.description: Currency code for the price values.

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking info was last updated.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling delivery.

trackingId.description: Tracking identifier provided by the courier.

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied for all cart items.

currency.description: Currency code used for prices in the cart.

userId.description: Identifier for the user owning this cart.

items.description: List of individual items in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Amount that the user needs to pay after discounts.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the cart details.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway processing the payment

active.description: Indicator if the user account is active

userType.description: Type or role of the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

currency.description: Currency code used in the payment

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway

createdAt.description: Date and time when the product was created

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI settings.

currency.description: Currency code in which price is listed

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the product details were last updated

error.description: Short error code or phrase describing the client error

message.description: Detailed message explaining the client error

status.description: HTTP status code of the client error

path.description: Request path that caused the error

details.description: List of detailed issues related to the error

field.description: Name of the field that caused the issue

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field

error.description: Short error code or phrase describing the server error

message.description: Detailed message explaining the server error

status.description: HTTP status code of the server error
